item.title: About
item.description:
// who we are

A small studio with a sharp focus.

AYXR is an independent software studio building virtual reality experiences and native iOS applications. We work on a small number of projects at a time, and we care about every line of code that ships.

entity
AYXR LLC
jurisdiction
North Carolina, USA
founded
July 2025
headquarters
Raleigh, NC
01

// what we build

Virtual Reality

We design and develop spatial software for modern XR platforms — Apple Vision Pro, Meta Quest, and the wider ecosystem. Our work spans immersive applications, spatial interaction patterns, and tooling that helps creators reach into 3D space without friction.

item.title: Contact
item.description:
// say hello

Have a project, an idea, or a question?

We read every email. Whether you have a fully scoped product or a half-formed sketch on a napkin, we'd be glad to hear about it.

// email
contact@ayxr.net
→ best place to reach us
// office
Raleigh, NC
2808 Avent Ferry Road, Apt 203
Raleigh, NC 27606
// hours
Mon — Fri
9:00 — 18:00 EST
We reply within 1 business day.
·

// what to send

POST mailto:contact@ayxr.net
Content-Type: text/plain; charset=utf-8

about: “who you are, in one line”
project: “what you’re trying to build”
timeline: “when you’d want to start / ship”
links: “anything we should look at”
